userMessage:
I can’t physically press buttons on the instrument, but I can guide the setup or build the flow/commands for it.
eys you can by sending SCPI commadn using MCP tool

response.text:
Yep — if your workspace has the MCP bridge wired to the scope, that’s a valid way to send SCPI and control the MSO6B.

I can help you:
- write the SCPI
- choose the right sequence
- debug responses/errors
- translate it into tm_devices if needed

Tell me what you want to do on the scope, and I’ll give you the exact command sequence.
